specs.title: cp-000: 6 stage buttons displayed in order
cp-002: Can click any stage to navigate non-linear
cp-003: AI chat adapts Socratic method to current stage
cp-005: Clicking opens dropdown with options
cp-008: Dropdown closes on selection it does not currently dismiss on outside click
cp-009: Rich text editor renders in center column
cp-010: Editor accepts typing and formatting
cp-011: Content syncs with document state
cp-014: Bullet list Numbered list Checklist
cp-018: Table insertion 33 with header row
cp-028: Editor triggers handleDirty on changes saves to localStorage
cp-029: Title changes debounced at 1 second
cp-030: Content changes debounced at 2 seconds
cp-031: Save status updates after debounce
cp-032: Typing at start of line or after space triggers command menu
cp-033: Menu shows case-insensitive filtered results as user types
cp-034: Table inserts a 3x3 table with a header row
